sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100781" key="sunoikhth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνοικ-ητήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n100781.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">house-fellow</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λιμός, ἐχθρὸς ς</foreign>. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0260.tlg001:7:102" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Semon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.102</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
